vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (bầu không khí, kiến thức)
vocab.example: I love to spend my Sunday afternoons soaking up the tranquil atmosphere of the local contemporary art wing.

vocab.meaning: đạt được tiêu chuẩn, kỳ vọng hoặc so sánh được với cái gì
vocab.example: While digital prints are nice, they never quite measure up to the experience of seeing an original oil painting in person.
I occasionally stumble upon hidden gems in smaller, independent galleries that aren't mentioned in the tourist guides.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên, làm hiện lên (hình ảnh, ký ức, cảm xúc)
vocab.example: Some abstract pieces are so powerful that they conjure up vivid childhood memories I had long forgotten.

vocab.meaning: phấn khích quá mức và nói chi tiết về một chủ đề chuyên môn
vocab.example: My friend and I usually geek out over the technical aspects of the sculptures, like the casting process or material choice.

vocab.meaning: suy ngẫm, cân nhắc kỹ lưỡng về điều gì đó
vocab.example: I often find myself mulling over the deeper meaning behind a conceptual installation long after I've left the gallery.
The use of vibrant, neon colors really makes the portrait stand out against the more subdued tones of the rest of the exhibition.

vocab.meaning: truyền đạt thành công một thông điệp hoặc ý tưởng
vocab.example: It's fascinating to see how different artists manage to get their political messages across through subtle symbolism.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần, len lỏi qua (cảm xúc hoặc ánh sáng)
vocab.example: The way the afternoon light filters through the gallery skylights adds a magical quality to the sculptures on display.

vocab.meaning: dần dần khiến ai đó thích (dù ban đầu không thích)
vocab.example: Initially, I found modern art quite baffling, but after a few visits, it has really started to grow on me.
